mapper.select: SELECT result_id, order_id, lot_no, actual_qty, defect_qty, worker_name, started_at, ended_at, created_at FROM production_result ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT -- production_result 기본 컬럼만 pr.result_id, pr.order_id, pr.product_id, pr.lot_no, pr.actual_qty, pr.defect_qty, pr.worker_name, pr.started_at, pr.ended_at, pr.created_at,
-- work_order 조인 (상태 필터용) wo.status, wo.order_qty
FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id
1=1
AND DATE(pr.created_at) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(pr.created_at) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND wo.status = #{status}
AND ( pr.worker_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id
1=1
AND DATE(pr.created_at) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(pr.created_at) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND wo.status = #{status}
AND ( pr.worker_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
